mapper.select: select id, idname, sqlstr from cotdl.tbl_testdataidtype order by id
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_testdataidtype (id, idname, sqlstr) values (#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sqlstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
insert into COTDL.tbl_testdataidtype (id, idname, sqlstr) values (#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sqlstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_testdataidtype where id = #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select id, idname, sqlstr from cotdl.tbl_testdataidtype
order by id
